blended.narrative: Sleeping Giant is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.5 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,787 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.6" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 48".
